tables.table_title: Comparison of reCAPTCHA v2 Solvers' Performance
tables.table_note: Table~\ref{tab:comparisonsolvers} shows the performance of different solvers on reCAPTCHA v2 challenges. The basic solver has an accuracy of 75\%, takes 0.5 seconds to solve, and has a success rate of 60\%. The enhanced solver improves these metrics to 85\% accuracy, 1.2 seconds, and 75\% success rate. Incorporating a machine learning model further enhances the performance, achieving 95\% accuracy, 2.0 seconds, and 90\% success rate.
